svg.title: The Monday-morning diagnostic: a four-step process for finding the disclosure gap
svg.desc: A four-step process shown top to bottom. Step one: pick one concept that appears on at least three surfaces, with destructive actions as the recommended starting point. Step two: open four tabs — docs, product UI, onboarding, and chatbot — each labelled. Step three: check whether the qualifier word survived across all four. Step four: diagnose the outcome as healthy system, content drift, or system failure based on how many surfaces preserved the qualifier.
svg.text: A 15-minute diagnostic for finding the disclosure gap in your product
One concept in your product that appears on at least three surfaces.
Destructive actions are the best starting point. The stakes make the disclosure problem visible.
Find the word or phrase in the docs version that carries the warning,
the condition, or the causal link.
Example: in "deleting this may impact downstream models," the load-bearing words are "may impact."
